rationale: The page contains a world map detailing various disaster-affected areas in the news, which is relevant content. The lower half is an advertisement for a CSAT crash course, but the map provides significant informational value.
cleanedText:
7.2.3. DISASTER AFFECTED AREAS IN NEWS
World: Disaster Affected Areas in News
* Mount Etna (Volcanic Eruption): Located in Sicily Island, Italy. Europe's largest active volcano. UNESCO World Heritage Site.
* Türkiye (Capital: Ankara): Earthquake hits Turkey's Balikesir Province.
* Cyclone Asna: Tropical cyclone along the west coast, Arabian Sea.
* Vietnam (Capital: Hanoi): Typhoon Bualoi in the Northwest Pacific Ocean.
* Peru (Capital: Lima): Earthquake strike the coast of southern Peru.
* Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) (Capital: Kinshasa): Floods occurred in eastern part of DRC near shores of Lake Tanganyika.
* Afghanistan (Kabul): Earthquake in Kunar Province.
* Chile (Capital: Santiago): 7.4 magnitude earthquake Hits Southern Chile.
* Algeria (Capital: Algiers): Earthquake strikes Tebessa province.
* Mount Lewotobi Laki-laki (Volcanic Eruption): Located in Flores Island, Indonesia.
* Kilauea volcano (Volcanic Eruption): Located on the Southeastern part of the island of Hawaii, U.S.
* Hayli Gubbi, Ethiopia (Volcanic Eruption): Sent a massive ash cloud across Red Sea and South Asia.
* Mount Semeru, Indonesia (Volcanic Eruption): Stratovolcano; Highest volcano on Java Island; part of the Pacific Ring of Fire, Merapi Volcano in Indonesia.
VISIONIAS CSAT CRASH COURSE PRELIMS 2026
* Start: 5 January, 11 AM (Offline/Online)
* Medium: English
* Approach: Revise and strengthen fundamental concepts, enhance problem-solving abilities, hone analytical skills, foster critical thinking, and improve comprehension skills for Prelims 2026.
* Program Outcomes:
* Efficient Time Management and Exam-taking Strategies
* Problem-Solving Techniques Including Tips and Tricks
* Proficiency in Interpreting and Analyzing Data Presented in Various Formats
* Reading Comprehension and Language Proficiency
* Logical and Analytical Thinking Skills
* Reinforced Learning through Regular Practice and Tutorials
* Firm command on Mathematical Concepts and Development of Quantitative aptitude
* Development of Confidence to Tackle the Exam
